name: Rep. Mike Levin
tweet: Ultimately, with my Restoring Community Input & Public Protections in Oil & Gas Leasing Act, we can reduce greenhouse gas emissions AND protect the environment, private landowners, and taxpayer interests.

name: Rep. Mike Levin
tweet: Myth: Eliminating noncompetitive leasing will hurt taxpayers and states.  Fact: Noncompetitive leasing is an outdated process that lets companies acquire vast tracks of public lands for less than a cup of ☕.

name: Rep. Mike Levin
tweet: Myth: Companies disclose enough information, and citizens have more than enough ways to engage in the leasing process.  Fact: Companies nominate public lands for auction anonymously and with no fee. My bill fixes this.

name: Rep. Mike Levin
tweet: Myth: Restricting U.S. oil & gas drilling is worse for the environment.  Fact: Reducing consumption of fossil fuels is the best thing we can do to protect our planet. We should focus on clean energy solutions instead of drilling for more oil.

tweet: I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: Even one homeless veteran is one too many, and we have a moral obligation to make robust federal investments in programs to help get veterans off our streets.

name: Rep. Mike Levin
tweet: And it includes the Bill Mulder Transition Improvement Act, a bill I introduced with @RepArrington to make to make the transition process easier for servicemembers returning to civilian life.

name: Rep. Mike Levin
tweet: It includes the Veterans Economic Recovery Act, a bill I introduced with @DrPhilRoe to create a rapid retraining program for unemployed veterans and reservists.

name: Rep. Mike Levin
tweet: It includes my Housing for Women Veterans Act, a bill I introduced with @RepBrianFitz to require the VA to complete an analysis of its programs that provide assistance to women veterans who are homeless to identify the areas in which such programs are failing to meet their needs.

tweet: It includes the Reducing Veteran Homelessness Act, a bill I introduced with @GOPLeader to ensure that homeless veterans and their families receive the resources and services they deserve by filling gaps in HUD-VASH case management.

tweet: It includes the Veteran HOUSE Act, a bill I co-led with @RepScottPeters to expand the HUD-VASH program to homeless veterans discharged under conditions other-than-honorable.

name: Rep. Mike Levin
tweet: It includes the Homeless Veteran Coronavirus Response Act, a bill I introduced with my friend @RepGusBilirakis to expand and strengthen VA services for homeless veterans during the COVID-19 pandemic.

tweet: It’s not just accidental shootings. Over 75 percent of school shootings involve kids and teens having access to unsecured or unsupervised guns at home. And more than 80 percent of guns used by youth in suicide attempts were kept in the home of the victim, a relative, or a friend.

name: Rep. Mike Levin
tweet: The #PreventFamilyFire Act provides a modest tax credit to incentivize the sale of things like gun safes. If we expand safe storage, we can reduce accidental shootings by 73 percent. It’s that simple.

name: Rep. Mike Levin
tweet: Every single day, eight kids are killed or injured by unintentional shootings with guns found in the home. We can prevent that by expanding safe storage of firearms. Today, I’m introducing a bipartisan bill to do just that. #PreventFamilyFire  https://t.co/VwYnpIenNk
